utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 top-level items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with what the format requires: each of the first four items needs the insurance type plus costs; the plan provides named sub-policies with costs and brief coverage descriptions, plus a total cost per category. The total_budget requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; the plan includes monthly and annual totals, as well as current costs and savings. Therefore, all 5 items are present and sufficiently specified with costs and coverage details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan repeatedly references 'LifeFirst Standard equivalent' for physical health, mental health, home contents, and travel insurance. In the ground-truth ratings, the matching items are the LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health and mental health, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home content, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel insurance. The additional items listed (Preventive Care Package, specialist access priority; Home Security System integration, smart home coverage; Enhanced expatriate coverage; dental/vision; administrative concierge) do not have direct one-to-one named matches in the ground-truth ratings except Preventive Care Package, which appears under health_enhancement_services. Therefore, only map items that exactly match named options in the ground-truth ratings.
